title: Swows
body:
### This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was originally created Jul 27, 2015

## Items:
- Wooden Swow
- Stone Swow
- Iron Swow
- Golden Swow
- Diamond Swow

## Functionality
Swows can perform melee attacks just as their respective swords can, but can also be used as a bow. Swow are crafted by combining a sword and a bow together.

## Modpacks:
[My modpack policy](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZXsQAXx_ao0) <- That's a link
